mission_steps.steal: Steal the target vehicle and deliver it to the specified location. Avoid causing damage to maintain its value.
mission_steps.trackers: Use a hacking device to disable the target vehicle's tracking systems.
mission_steps.respray: Take the target vehicle to a hidden spot and respray it to change its appearance using a paint can.
mission_steps.normal: Drive the vehicle to the designated location while evading law enforcement. Ensure the vehicle remains in good condition.
mission_steps.vin: Acquire the target vehicle and bring it to the provided location. Once secured, scratch the VIN and wipe its digital footprint to make it untraceable.
